polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed:. Summarize overall market sentiment based on the data. Data: only one market: "Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?: Yes 38% (vol $261,094)". So probability of dip to $1500 is 38% (implies 62% chance it will NOT dip). So sentiment is somewhat bullish (since less likely to dip). So we can say Bullish: because only 38% chance of dip, volume $261k indicates moderate interest. Must be max 80 words. One paragraph. Let's craft ~30 words.

"Bullish: The prediction market shows only a 38% chance Ethereum will fall to $1,500 by end‑2026, implying a 62% likelihood it stays above that level, while the $261,094 traded volume reflects solid trader confidence in upside potential."

Count words: Bullish:(1) The2 prediction3 market4 shows5 only6 a7 38%8 chance9 Ethereum10 will11 fall12 to13 $1,50014 by15 end‑2026,16 implying17 a18 62%19

polymarket.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?

Will LeBron James play for the Golden State Warriors in 2026-27?
Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $90 in July?
Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
Israel x Iran ceasefire continues through July 25?
US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret sentiment: The data includes Fed rates: no change 75% (vol $1.19M), increase 25bps 24% (vol $456k). So expectation of no change is high => bullish for rates (stable). WTI hitting $95: 42% (vol $338k). WTI hitting $90: 75% (vol $292k). So higher chance of hitting $90 than $95. So oil price expectation moderate. LeBron James to GSW: 12% low. US invade Iran before 2027: 29% moderate. Israel x Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 76% high. US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24: 4% very low. So overall sentiment: stable rates, moderate oil upside, high chance of Israel-Iran ceasefire, low chance of US-Iran ceasefire, low chance of US invading Iran, low chance of LeBron to GSW. Mixed? Probably mixed: bullish on rates and ceasefire, bearish on geopolitical risk (US invade Iran low but still some), oil
